title: Full Vault Rocks
description: A texture pack I made to take the new vault rocks and style them like the old ones. I tried to keep them as close to the original while bringing back the old vault rock shape.
body:
# Full Vault Rocks
A texture pack I made to take the new vault rocks and style them like the old ones. I tried to keep them as close to the original while bringing back the old vault rock shape. 

![Every vault rock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f7de179f083f70b37bdcd6b1a3c0d5935faf6a6.png)
> Every vault rock on a wall of plastic
